name: Cherry Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, shortening, and butter until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add flour, baking powder, salt, and cherry flavoring to the mixture with milk, alternating additions between dry and liquid ingredients.
4. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated and the batter is creamy.
5. Stir in the chopped cherries.
6. Pour the batter into a greased tube pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
8. Increase the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
Note: Ensure all equipment and utensils are clean before use.
